name: createUser
description: Create a new user. Only accessible for admin users.

email.description: Email address of the new user

password.description: Password of the new user. Only if authMethod is DB.

authMethod.description: Authentication method. Only DB and LDAP are accepted by this endpoint.

success.description: True if the operation completed successfully.

message.description: A message that describes the result of the operation.

username.description: The normalized username as it is stored in the database. Use this username to authenticate and identify the user in other parts of JATOS.
